title: Who Clicked My Bones?
description:
Who Clicked My Bones? is short Incremental game about:

• Spawning skeleton army (Awake them from the dead, again)

• Sacrifice them (they already dead so I think they don't mind being sacrifice)

• Upgrade your army (so you can sacrifice them even more, seriously I don't think they mind being sacrificed) 

• Summon The Lich King (to hangout with the rest of the skeleton Army)

Populate Your Skelton ArmyIncrease you army to help them become stronger army.

Sacrifice your ArmySacrifice your army on Raid to gain Soul of the Dead.

Upgrade your skeleton ArmyUpgrade to fill your Skeleton Army with even more powerful Skeleton to serve your desire

Features• Millions Number of Skelton in Your Arsenal

• 10++ Type of Skelton to Unlock for you Army

• Short Gameplay (4~ hours of playtime)
description_short: Who Clicked My Bones? is short Incremental Game about ruling a massive amount of skeleton army to sacrifice in order to Summon Lich King. Upgrade your skeleton in Skill Tree. The Game is designed to be finished in 4 hour playtime.
